overview: Vajra is a discipline streak tracker with an honesty-first philosophy. Track daily habits like Brahmachariya, Meditation, and Exercise with a visually striking fire-glow streak system, milestone badge unlocks, and a motivational quotes engine. All data stays on your device — no account needed.
features: Fire streak animations that grow with your consistency
Milestone badge system with full-screen unlock animations
Honest streak break log for self-reflection
Trophy Room for all earned badges
Streak Freeze Token to protect one missed day
Push notification reminders and streak-at-risk warnings
Quick Tap shortcut page for rapid activity completion
Custom activities with emoji and reminders
Offline-first PWA — installable on any device
